name: Wall Mounted Drying Rack Black - Brightroom™: Steel Pull Down Clothes Dryer, Folding Mountable, 10kg Capacity
description:
Add convenient extra hanging space to your laundry room with this Wall-Mounted Drying Rack from Brightroom™. Designed with a convenient space-saving construction that folds up flat against the wall when not in use, this wall-mounted drying rack is easily opened to instantly add more space for hanging your clothes, linens and more to dry. Rust-resistant carbon steel and rubberwood materials provide a stylish and practical design, while a 25.2-inch by 36.42-inch side adds plenty of space for air-drying a variety of garments.

Brightroom™ started with a simple truth: When you’ve got it together, you feel better. Our versatile designs reveal the possibility in every closet, cupboard and drawer, and work together to create brilliant ways to organize your every day.
